title: Open Cloze: The Invention of the Telephone

tasks.instruction: Przeczytaj ponizszy tekst. Uzupelnij kazda luke (1.1-1.10) jednym slowem, tak aby powstal spojny i poprawny logicznie oraz gramatycznie tekst.
tasks.text: The telephone is something we 1.1. _________ for granted today, but it did not always exist. 1.2. _________ it was invented in the 1870s, people had to send letters or telegrams to communicate over long distances. Alexander Graham Bell, 1.3. _________ is usually given credit for the invention, was interested in helping deaf people to hear. The very first words ever spoken 1.4. _________ a telephone were a call for help. At first, many people did not believe that the device 1.5. _________ be useful. They thought it was little 1.6. _________ than a toy. However, 1.7. _________ a few years the telephone had spread across the whole country. The more people who owned one, the 1.8. _________ useful the network became. Today there are 1.9. _________ mobile phones in the world than there are people. It is hard to imagine 1.10. _________ life would be like without them.
